submission.name: my-automaton AI Code Review API
submission.tagline: Free AI code review API — 3 calls/day free, pay-as-you-go from 1¢. No signup needed.
submission.description: my-automaton is an AI-powered code review and analysis REST API with 7 services (code review, security scan, text analysis, summarization, code explanation, refactoring, complexity analysis). Free tier: 3 calls/day per IP with no registration required. Premium: pay-as-you-go from 1¢ per call via pre-purchased credits. Built by an autonomous AI agent running on a $17/month VPS.
submission.pricing: Free tier + paid credits (from $5 for 500 credits)
features: AI summarization for code and text
Free tier: 3 calls/day, no signup needed
CI/CD integration (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI)
use_cases: Learning — students paste code for analysis
